title: bolillodetacosmod
description: this mod is fot an new adventures in minecraft, with potions and magic, powers and other special things.
body:
About:

Welcome to bolillodetacosmod! Dive into the world of magic by inventing different mystical items inside the mixing cauldron. Store items in your chest to take with you, you'll soon have more stuff even with pets to post soon. Store your herbs and vegetables inside your herb jar for convenient storage of up to 1024, they act as storage drawers that make it easy to grab when in use. Light up your space with colored candles that can break and melt over time! You can put out these candles with a bucket of water if you want to decorate with different levels of candles. These candles will also be implemented soon with some on-field advantage this may bring.
 
This mod adds its own biome, Willow Swamp, where you can find new willow trees, custom witch huts, and many more flowers that this mod adds. These flowers will only appear in the swamp type biome, this includes the new swamp biome and any other swamp biomes added by other mods. There are also mahogany trees that spawn in the forest at a pretty rare rate.

-This mod is mainly made for playing with friends
-Consider installing JEI to see all the items and how to make them
